summary: Tested lead claim flow for i'M On Social CRM. All 8 features verified working. POST /api/demo-requests/{id}/claim creates contacts from demo request data with tags=['new_client','hot_lead'], returns {status, contact_id, contact_name, prefill_message}, is idempotent (returns 'already_claimed' on second call), updates notifications with contact_id so link changes from /admin/lead-tracking to /contact/{id}. Notification center includes demo_request_id, lead_email, lead_phone for new_lead notifications. Referral demo requests create notifications for referring user AND admins.

claim_requires_user_id.details: POST /api/demo-requests/{id}/claim without user_id returns proper error message

claim_nonexistent_lead_error.details: Claiming non-existent demo request returns 'Lead not found' error

claim_creates_contact_e2e.details: Full flow: create demo request → claim → contact created with first_name, last_name, phone, email, tags=['new_client','hot_lead']

claim_idempotent.details: Second claim returns {status:'already_claimed', contact_id} with same contact_id as first claim

notification_link_updated_after_claim.details: Before claim: link=/admin/lead-tracking, After claim: link=/contact/{contact_id}

notification_has_demo_request_id.details: new_lead notifications include demo_request_id, lead_email, lead_phone fields

referral_notifies_referrer_and_admins.details: Demo request with ref code creates notification for referring user (ref_code=34C53029, referred_by_name=Forest Ward)

prefill_message_personalized.details: Prefill message includes first name and source: 'Hi Jessica! Thanks for reaching out through our prefill test...'

verified_features: POST /api/demo-requests/{id}/claim creates contact from demo request data (first_name, last_name, phone, email, tags=['new_client','hot_lead'])
Claim returns {status:'success', contact_id, contact_name, prefill_message} with personalized welcome message
Claiming again returns {status:'already_claimed', contact_id} - idempotent behavior
After claiming, notification updated with contact_id so link changes from /admin/lead-tracking to /contact/{id}
Notification center returns demo_request_id field for new_lead notifications so frontend can call claim
Campaign send notifications link to /contact/{id}?prefill={message} (verified in previous iteration)
NotificationBell.tsx imports useAuthStore and uses user._id for the claim call (lines 16, 104, 130)
Demo request with referral code (ref param) creates notifications for referring user AND admins
critical_code_review_comments: demo_requests.py (lines 368-462): claim_lead endpoint properly implemented - creates contact, updates notification, builds personalized prefill message
notifications_center.py (lines 73-90): Lead notifications include demo_request_id, lead_email, lead_phone, referred_by_name as expected
NotificationBell.tsx (lines 122-152): handleNotificationPress calls claim API for new_lead notifications, then navigates to /contact/{id} with prefill param
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed demo requests and contacts during testing for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead claim flow fully tested and working. POST /api/demo-requests/{id}/claim is the key endpoint. It creates contacts with tags=['new_client','hot_lead'] and returns a prefill_message for the welcome SMS. The notification's link updates from /admin/lead-tracking to /contact/{id} after claiming. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_lead_claim_flow.py can be rerun for regression testing.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
